milestones.title: HTML Structure
milestones.description: Build the HTML foundation for DevBlog: header with navigation, main content area, sidebar, and footer.

milestones.title: CSS Styling
milestones.description: Style DevBlog with modern CSS: Flexbox/Grid, CSS variables, responsive design, dark theme.

milestones.title: Client Interactivity
milestones.description: Add JavaScript: theme toggle, form validation, post creation modal.

milestones.title: REST API Backend
milestones.description: Build Express backend with REST endpoints for users and posts.

milestones.title: Authentication
milestones.description: Add JWT authentication: register, login, protected routes.

milestones.title: Loading & Error States
milestones.description: Add loading spinners, error messages, graceful error handling.

milestones.title: Polish & Deploy
milestones.description: Rate limiting, CORS, environment variables, deployment.
